components__educational-games__leo-word-.dan_left_the_house_he_walked_to_the_park: Dan left the house. He walked to the park and played. Then he came home for lunch.
components__educational-games__leo-word-.rain_fell_the_kids_played_inside_after_t: Rain fell. The kids played inside. After the rain, a rainbow appeared.
components__educational-games__leo-word-.mia_woke_up_in_the_morning_she_ate_break: Mia woke up in the morning. She ate breakfast. She packed her bag and went to school.
components__educational-games__leo-word-.jo_drank_water_he_got_dressed_and_went_o: Jo drank water. He got dressed and went out. He rode his bike to the park.
components__educational-games__leo-word-.mom_turned_on_the_oven_she_baked_a_cake_: Mom turned on the oven. She baked a cake. Everyone ate together.
components__educational-games__leo-word-.the_sun_set_stars_came_out_the_children_: The sun set. Stars came out. The children went to bed.
components__educational-games__leo-word-.noa_opened_a_book_she_read_two_pages_she: Noa opened a book. She read two pages. She closed it and put it on the shelf.
components__educational-games__leo-word-.the_wind_blew_hard_leaves_fell_then_ligh: The wind blew hard. Leaves fell. Then light rain came down.
components__educational-games__leo-word-.mia_loved_to_read_books_every_evening_sh: Mia loved to read books. Every evening she sat in a corner with a new book.
components__educational-games__leo-word-.jo_learned_to_ride_a_bike_at_first_he_fe: Jo learned to ride a bike. At first he fell, but he kept trying. In the end he rode alone.
components__educational-games__leo-word-.heavy_rain_fell_the_kids_played_board_ga: Heavy rain fell. The kids played board games. After the rain, a rainbow appeared.
components__educational-games__leo-word-.dan_took_care_of_the_garden_he_watered_f: Dan took care of the garden. He watered flowers and pulled weeds. The garden looked beautiful.
components__educational-games__leo-word-.the_family_made_pizza_together_each_pers: The family made pizza together. Each person picked a topping. They ate happily together.
components__educational-games__leo-word-.noa_learned_a_new_song_she_practiced_aga: Noa learned a new song. She practiced again and again. She sang in front of the class.
components__educational-games__leo-word-.the_cat_slept_on_the_sofa_it_woke_up_ate: The cat slept on the sofa. It woke up, ate, and went back to sleep. It was a quiet day.
components__educational-games__leo-word-.dan_left_the_house_with_a_bag_he_walked_: Dan left the house with a bag. He walked to the park and played with friends. Then he came home for lunch.
components__educational-games__leo-word-.heavy_rain_fell_the_kids_stayed_inside_a: Heavy rain fell. The kids stayed inside and played board games.
components__educational-games__leo-word-.what_can_we_learn_from_the_passage: What can we learn from the passage?
components__educational-games__leo-word-.they_stayed_inside_because_of_rain: They stayed inside because of rain
components__educational-games__leo-word-.grandma_asked_for_help_at_the_market_noa: Grandma asked for help at the market. Noa went with her and helped carry bags.
components__educational-games__leo-word-.jo_fell_off_his_bike_but_kept_practicing: Jo fell off his bike but kept practicing until he could ride on his own.
components__educational-games__leo-word-.what_did_we_learn_about_jo: What did we learn about Jo?
components__educational-games__leo-word-.the_teacher_told_a_story_the_children_li: The teacher told a story. The children listened quietly. At the end everyone clapped.
components__educational-games__leo-word-.the_dog_waited_by_the_door_when_dan_came: The dog waited by the door. When Dan came back, its tail wagged with joy.
components__educational-games__leo-word-.mom_made_soup_everyone_sat_at_the_table_: Mom made soup. Everyone sat at the table. They ate together warmly.
components__educational-games__leo-word-.the_kids_planted_a_pot_they_watered_it_e: The kids planted a pot. They watered it every day. After two weeks a flower grew.
components__educational-games__leo-word-.jo_learned_to_ride_he_fell_but_kept_prac: Jo learned to ride. He fell, but kept practicing. In the end he rode on his own.
components__educational-games__leo-word-.the_girl_smiled_at_everyone_she_helped_a: The girl smiled at everyone. She helped a friend who fell. Everyone liked her.
components__educational-games__leo-word-.he_looked_around_carefully_he_waited_bef: He looked around carefully. He waited before crossing the street.
components__educational-games__leo-word-.she_did_not_give_up_on_the_puzzle_she_tr: She did not give up on the puzzle. She tried again and again until it was solved.
components__educational-games__leo-word-.he_shared_his_candy_with_everyone_he_did: He shared his candy with everyone. He did not keep it all for himself.
components__educational-games__leo-word-.she_listened_quietly_she_did_not_bother_: She listened quietly. She did not bother her friends.
components__educational-games__leo-word-.he_cleaned_his_room_before_going_out_eve: He cleaned his room before going out. Everything was in its place.

lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.tap_a_card_to_flip_it_and_find_its_match: Tap a card to flip it, and find its matching pair. Every pair you find stays open.
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.you_start_with_a_high_score_the_longer_y: You start with a high score - the longer you take, the lower it drops. Finding all the pairs before time runs out = a win.
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.winning_based_on_difficulty_level_grants: Winning based on difficulty level grants coins and diamonds. The higher the score, the bigger the reward.
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.jump_over_obstacles_and_collect_coins: Jump over obstacles and collect coins!
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.tap_to_jump_get_past_obstacles_and_colle: Tap to jump. Get past obstacles and collect coins, diamonds, and magnets along the way.
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.coins_and_diamonds_add_points_consecutiv: Coins and diamonds add points. Consecutive jumps over obstacles give a combo bonus. Hitting an obstacle ends the game.
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.pop_balloons_before_time_runs_out: Pop balloons before time runs out!
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.tap_balloons_to_pop_them_you_have_three_: Tap balloons to pop them. You have three lives and one minute. Watch out for bombs!
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.regular_gold_and_diamond_balloons_add_po: Regular, gold, and diamond balloons add points. Clock balloons add time, and heart balloons restore a life. A bomb takes away a life.
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.reaching_the_pop_target_or_a_high_final_: Reaching the pop target or a high final score grants coins and diamonds.
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.watch_for_special_balloons_they_can_help: Watch for special balloons - they can help you before time runs out.
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.find_the_exit_of_the_maze_before_time_ru: Find the exit of the maze before time runs out!
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.move_leo_through_the_maze_collect_keys_a: Move Leo through the maze, collect keys and stars, and find the exit before time runs out.
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.keys_stars_and_diamonds_add_points_finis: Keys, stars, and diamonds add points. Finishing the maze gives a big bonus. If time runs out - the game ends.
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.successfully_finishing_the_maze_based_on: Successfully finishing the maze based on difficulty level grants coins, and a score bonus adds even more.
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.collect_the_keys_first_sometimes_they_un: Collect the keys first - sometimes they unlock a shorter path.
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.drag_the_picture_pieces_to_the_right_pla: Drag the picture pieces to the right place on the board. Complete all the pieces before time runs out.
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.completing_the_puzzle_based_on_difficult: Completing the puzzle based on difficulty level grants coins, and a score bonus adds even more.
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.tap_the_targets_before_they_disappear: Tap the targets before they disappear!
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.tap_the_targets_that_appear_on_the_scree: Tap the targets that appear on the screen before they disappear. You have three lives.
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.regular_targets_stars_and_diamonds_are_w: Regular targets, stars, and diamonds are worth different points. Missing costs a life. Consecutive hits give a combo bonus.
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.reaching_the_hit_target_or_a_high_final_: Reaching the hit target or a high final score grants coins and diamonds.
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.sort_shapes_and_colors_into_the_correct_: Sort shapes and colors into the correct boxes!
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.drag_each_shape_to_the_matching_box_by_s: Drag each shape to the matching box by shape or color. Finish all the sorting before time runs out.
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.every_correct_sort_adds_points_a_mistake: Every correct sort adds points. A mistake deducts from the score. If time runs out before you finish - the game ends.
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.finishing_successfully_based_on_difficul: Finishing successfully based on difficulty level grants coins, and a score bonus adds even more.
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.first_decide_which_box_each_shape_belong: First decide which box each shape belongs to - then drag with confidence.
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.place_shapes_clear_rows_and_columns_and_: Place shapes, clear rows and columns, and reach the score target!
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.drag_shapes_onto_the_board_rotate_them_i: Drag shapes onto the board, rotate them if needed, and place them to fill rows and columns.
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.clearing_a_row_or_column_adds_points_the: Clearing a row or column adds points. The goal is to reach the score target before the board fills up.
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.try_to_clear_several_rows_at_once_it_giv: Try to clear several rows at once - it gives a lot of points.
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.slice_fruit_avoid_bombs_and_reach_the_sc: Slice fruit, avoid bombs, and reach the score target!
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.drag_your_finger_across_the_screen_to_sl: Drag your finger across the screen to slice flying fruit. Avoid bombs - you have three mistakes allowed.
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.every_fruit_sliced_adds_points_slicing_s: Every fruit sliced adds points. Slicing several fruits at once gives a combo bonus. Hitting a bomb or missing a fruit costs a mistake.
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.reaching_the_score_target_based_on_diffi: Reaching the score target based on difficulty level grants coins and diamonds.
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.merge_mining_dogs_break_rocks_and_earn_p: Merge mining dogs, break rocks, and earn points to redeem!
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.points_can_be_redeemed_for_leo_coins_and: Points can be redeemed for Leo coins and diamonds (once the server is ready).
lib__solo-games__solo-game-registry.upgrade_dps_to_break_rocks_faster_and_go: Upgrade DPS to break rocks faster, and GOLD to earn more coins from each rock.
